name: Justin M

steps.question: What have you been dealing with?
What have you tried so far?
How long has this been going on?
Where are things at right now?
Do you feel like you can figure this out on your own?

report:
Justin, when energy, digestion, and allergies all show up together and persist for years despite real effort, that's not three separate problems requiring three separate fixes. It's a pattern. Poor gut function drives systemic inflammation, which fuels allergic reactivity and drains your energy at the cellular level. At the same time, impaired energy metabolism weakens the gut's ability to maintain its barrier, regulate its immune responses, and move food through efficiently, creating a cycle that reinforces itself. The fact that you've tried supplements, dietary changes, doctors, and done your own research without breaking through tells us something important: the individual pieces you've addressed likely never targeted the deeper system connecting all of this. That's why things feel stuck, and why these issues have worked their way into your daily life for years now.

What actually moves the needle here is addressing the full loop at once, not chasing each symptom in isolation. That's exactly how we work at Prism. Your case would involve a thorough assessment of gut health, metabolic function, stress physiology, and the inflammatory drivers tying them together, with a team reviewing your specific history and patterns to build a plan that accounts for how these systems interact in your body. The reason this is hard to solve alone, even with good research skills, is that the sequence matters, the interactions between systems matter, and what looks like the obvious target is often downstream of the real issue. Having a team that understands these connections and can adjust course as your body responds is what turns years of being stuck into actual forward progress.

If you'd like to see how that process works in more detail, take a look at the link below.
